steps.expression: async () => { const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; const stamp = Date.now(); const searchToken = `rp${String(stamp).slice(-8)}`; const targetSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Right Panel Search Target ${stamp}`, systemPrompt: 'Unique helper agent for modal tag filtering.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario', searchToken], modelRefOrNull }); if (!targetSave.ok) { return false; } const memberOne = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Scenario Member ${stamp}-1`, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper agent.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!memberOne.ok) { return false; } const memberTwo = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Scenario Member ${stamp}-2`, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper agent.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!memberTwo.ok) { return false; } const saveResult = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `Right Panel Scenario ${stamp}`, topic: 'Validate right-panel interactions', goal: 'Exercise add remove color and manual actions', mode: 'manual', tags: ['scenario'], memberAgentIds: [memberOne.value.agent.id, memberTwo.value.agent.id], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); if (!saveResult.ok) { return false; } window.__scenarioRightPanelSearchToken = searchToken; return true; }

() => { const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-council-card-id]')).find((node) => node.textContent?.includes('Right Panel Scenario')); if (!(card instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } card.click(); return true; }

steps.text: Search active agents by title, description, or tag

steps.expression: () => { const input = document.querySelector('#council-view-add-member-search'); if (!(input instanceof HTMLInputElement)) { return false; } const searchToken = window.__scenarioRightPanelSearchToken; if (typeof searchToken !== 'string') { return false; } const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(input, searchToken); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return input.value === searchToken; }

() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Add'); if (!(button instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return false; } button.click(); return true; }
